name: QA 628
description:
PCP QA Test No. 628

libpcp_pmda botch in pmdaFetch for multiple DSO PMDAs used in the

on pmFetch ... bug #809111



Copyright (c) 1995-2002 Silicon Graphics, Inc.  All Rights Reserved.

on pmFetch ... bug #809111
